assertions.description: The PCB analyzer correctly reports 2 unrouted nets (Net-(C11-Pad1) between C11 and U5.3, and Net-(L11-Pad1) between U2.21 and L11.1). The 13 courtyard overlaps on this highly dense 27.3x24.5mm 4-layer RF board are a real layout concern, as components including decoupling caps and RF inductors are placed very tightly. The unrouted and overlap detection is accurate.
